purpose: Test whether the released frozen V357 historical reconstruction survives replacement of the current mature survivor list with a causal point-in-time OKX universe. No parameter, member, stop, holding period or cost assumption may change after outcomes are opened.

feature_policy.same_bar_stop_precedence: If the frozen trailing stop is touched inside a bar, exit at that stop before considering the close-based maximum-hold exit.

point_in_time_universe.matched_size_reason: The released reproducible V357 historical reconstruction used the same 18 mature contracts as the H22 comparison. Matching 18 isolates survivor composition rather than breadth.
point_in_time_universe.liquidity_measure: Sum of vol_quote over the latest 84 closed 4h bars ending at the signal bar.
point_in_time_universe.liquidity_data_validity: Every one of the latest 84 bars must have strictly positive vol_quote. This prevents the 2023-07-01 through 2023-08-20 archive rows with unavailable quote-volume fields from being treated as zero liquidity.
point_in_time_universe.candidate_selection: Among causally eligible instruments, select the top 18 by trailing 84-bar quote volume using instrument name only as deterministic tie order.
point_in_time_universe.reference_selection: Use the top 12 by the same causal trailing quote-volume measure within the selected 18 at each signal time.

membership_handling.entry: Only symbols in the current top-18 point-in-time panel may create a new signal.
membership_handling.active_trade_leaves_panel: Do not force an early exit solely because liquidity rank leaves the top 18; manage the already-open trade by its original frozen stop or maximum holding period. This avoids adding a new liquidity exit rule to V357.
membership_handling.delisting_or_missing_future_bar: Exit at the last complete available close, charge the frozen round-trip cost model, classify as terminal data exit, and hold no replacement position.
membership_handling.new_listing: A symbol can enter only after satisfying all 180 consecutive closed-bar and 84 positive quote-volume requirements.

comparison_panels.fixed_panel_source: Existing strict closed-15m-to-4h local source and released V357 reconstruction logic.

history.common_metric_start: Later of the first completed fixed-panel trade and first completed dynamic-panel trade after the first allowed signal.

prohibited_actions: change either V357 member after viewing results
change dynamic panel size 18 or reference size 12
change the 84-bar liquidity window or 180-bar minimum history
change EMA, Donchian, relative-strength, breadth, volume, ATR, stop or holding parameters
reverse a member or remove the weaker member after viewing results
select favorable symbols, dates, months, regimes or only surviving contracts
lower costs, ignore funding reserve or omit terminal exits
promote the result to A-grade or formal runtime automatically
